\100\104\101\103\071\066\082\073\085\085\122\049\086\055\079\061","\104\112\082\106\107\122\061\061","\083\048\100\111\066\055\047\053\114\089\069\050\065\087\085\117\120\048\067\061","\101\085\080\051\055\111\113\111\098\078\105\076\099\076\074\051\047\085\110\115\100\103\051\061","\052\088\049\056\078\053\056\085","\086\082\117\083\117\054\098\061","\098\069\113\079\121\052\068\120\086\052\115\082\085\056\112\108\068\077\079\061","\121\051\055\065\114\118\111\110\121\089\103\088\068\103\061\061","\121\056\115\089\068\053\108\055","\076\072\075\088\102\081\090\077\101\078\077\122\071\103\061\061";"\077\083\084\065\097\122\074\057\104\084\050\061";"\068\057\112\089\055\104\120\056\050\047\069\047\077\108\107\078\107\103\061\061","\075\120\100\098\084\077\049\086","\116\112\114\075\072\079\081\054\120\104\068\103\047\112\081\066\109\102\056\111\097\068\103\080\090\066\066\097\054\075\061\061";"\057\072\080\054\110\075\061\061","\090\076\050\102\112\122\061\061","\066\082\050\049\054\113\103\067\106\078\112\117\101\105\053\069\054\111\107\086\107\075\061\061","\088\115\119\111\114\099\112\077\080\070\061\061";"\110\043\088\098\070\070\061\061";"\065\106\101\076\098\075\061\061";"\105\080\070\122","\051\111\053\051\066\122\061\061";"\080\084\108\084\109\099\074\115\054\052\113\109\121\088\112\072";"\104\066\071\054\100\076\082\117","\087\118\087\087\051\122\107\098\075\083\048\050\117\054\105\106\107\079\075\116\043\101\112\117\068\115\101\068\068\122\061\061";"\086\069\068\122\043\043\113\066\075\099\074\104\121\090\102\071";"\113\089\110\105","\118\110\122\098\053\122\061\061","\078\108\071\116\105\103\061\061";"\074\105\081\056";"\115\122\068\088\109\048\090\055\114\103\061\061","\117\083\077\043\114\071\069\065","\055\065\073\080\073\098\108\084\069\083\085\104\069\055\118\061","\088\115\119\105\079\122\061\061";"\105\086\089\051\069\069\053\122\078\056\122\080\076\118\066\084\116\089\088\099\054\048\075\061","\114\083\043\107\111\108\111\049\119\119\074\087","\113 end return(function(T,Z,g,N,G,h,M,F,K,y,J,f,U,a,R,H,n,I,m,E,L,l,w,t)m,U,I,R,H,l,E,y,f,a,J,n,F,K,L,t,w=function(T)for B=942501+-942500,#T,-187072+187073 do f[T[B]]=f[T[B]]+(736050-736049)end if g then g=function(g,N,G,h,M,I,f)return t(T,{g,N;G;h,M;I;f},B,Z)end return g end,function(T)f[T]=f[T]-(163508+-163507)if f[T]==102385+-102385 then f[T],I[T]=nil,nil end end,function(T,B)local Z=m(B)local
